nano_prompt: Antique golden celestial-chart constellation figure representing a legal counsel, rendered as a full-body figure of connected golden star-points joined by delicate gold constellation lines, aged-parchment engraving shading and tiny radiant stars marking the joints, in the style of an ancient golden star atlas, holding justice scales, a gavel and a law-codex, centered single character, consistent framing, uniform chroma-key green background (#00b140), no text, no logo, high detail
